title: U.K. Advisers Sent to U.S. to Help Develop Options to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The move comes after President Trump sharply criticized Prime Minister Keir Starmer for not supporting his initial military strikes on Iran.
summary_public: The move comes after President Trump sharply criticized Prime Minister Keir Starmer for not supporting his initial military strikes on Iran.
